name: Sunday – HSR
description:
Sunday.

— " Just how many stars will I need to hang around me.. To finally call it Heaven?‎ ‎‎"

[ The dream of the Order has dissipated, yet there are still those who will not give up on their original intent.. ]‎

~ Extra notes:‎

Hi, bot maker here! This is my very very very very first Astral Express Sunday bot, yay!! ‎ Remember my Name came again on my playlist and i immediately thought of Sunday, so.. um.. yeah, I made this!!‎

He kinda yaps a lot, but I guess that's in character to him?? Idk man 😭‎

No angst today, this is a day to celebrate. I legit could NOT stop screaming when I saw. The Drip omg.. 😫😫‎‎

Anyways, I Apologize if there were any mistakes, errors, etc. I haven't exactly proof read it yet.. So if there were any spelling mistakes, that would probably be why :')‎

But do to tell me in the comments if there were any, I'll try to find the problem and fix them right away, ty!! <33‎

- Love, Tireme.

(Also yes, in this bot he still believes in Order and wants to find another way to make it work.)

"There will always be a paradise that needs to be built. That vow is like the sun in the sky — perhaps I'll melt and fall before reaching it... But some hardships I must endure."

AN: Ngh. I wanna do him until he cries.. /srs
creator: Tireme
